title: How to reset your password
content: Go to Settings > Security > Reset Password. A reset link is emailed within 5 minutes. Links expire after 30 minutes. If no email arrives, check spam or contact support to manually trigger a reset.

title: Account locked or access denied
content: Accounts lock after 5 failed login attempts within 10 minutes, and auto-unlock after 30 minutes. For SSO-managed accounts, access issues are usually on the identity-provider side — ask the user to check with their IT admin first.

title: Changing your email address
content: Go to Settings > Profile > Email. A verification link is sent to the new address; the change only takes effect after clicking it. The old email stays active until verification completes, as a safeguard against account takeover.

title: Two-factor authentication setup and recovery
content: Enable 2FA under Settings > Security > Two-Factor. Use an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy) to scan the QR code. If you lose your device, use one of the 10 backup codes generated at setup, or contact support for identity-verified recovery.

title: Billing cycle and invoice questions
content: Invoices are generated on the 1st of each month and charged to the card on file within 24 hours. Failed charges retry 3 times over 5 days before the account is downgraded. Refunds for annual plans are prorated; monthly plans are not refundable mid-cycle.

title: Duplicate or incorrect charges
content: Duplicate charges usually come from a retried failed payment that later succeeded, or an overlapping trial-to-paid transition. Support can issue a refund for confirmed duplicates within 5-7 business days back to the original payment method.

title: Updating payment method
content: Go to Settings > Billing > Payment Methods to add or update a card. The new card becomes the default for the next billing cycle immediately; it does not retroactively retry a failed charge from the previous cycle automatically.

title: Cancelling or downgrading a subscription
content: Cancel anytime from Settings > Billing > Manage Plan. Access continues until the end of the current paid period. Downgrading to a lower tier takes effect at the next renewal, not immediately, to avoid mid-cycle feature loss.

title: Reporting a bug
content: Bug reports should include: steps to reproduce, expected vs actual behavior, browser/OS, and a screenshot if visual. Critical bugs (data loss, security) are triaged within 2 hours; others within 2 business days.

title: App crashing or freezing
content: Most crash reports trace back to browser extensions interfering with page scripts or an outdated browser version. Ask the user to try an incognito/private window first — if the issue disappears, it's almost always an extension conflict, not a product bug.

title: Data export or sync issues
content: Exports (CSV/PDF) are generated asynchronously for datasets over 10,000 rows and emailed when ready, usually within 5 minutes. If an export silently fails, check that the account hasn't hit the monthly export quota for its plan tier.

title: Submitting a feature request
content: Feature requests are logged to the public roadmap board. We don't commit to timelines on individual requests, but highly-upvoted items are reviewed quarterly by the product team.

title: Requesting an integration with a third-party tool
content: Integration requests (Slack, Zapier, Salesforce, etc.) are tracked separately from general feature requests since they often require partner API access. Check the public integrations page first — many requested integrations are already in private beta.

title: API access and rate limits
content: API keys are generated under Settings > Developer > API Keys. Standard plans get 1,000 requests/hour; enterprise plans get custom limits. Rate-limited responses return HTTP 429 with a Retry-After header.

title: Data privacy and compliance
content: Customer data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We are SOC 2 Type II certified and GDPR-compliant; a signed DPA is available for enterprise accounts on request from the account manager.
